LEFT_POSTER.name: MOYOLA Logo
LEFT_POSTER.description: This project focuses on the creation of a visual identity for Moyola, developed in collaboration with Francesco Buffetta. The work included the design of the brand's logo and a series of graphic stickers intended to extend the identity into everyday urban environments. The visual language combines bold typography and street-inspired aesthetics to create a recognisable and flexible identity. The goal was to establish a strong and adaptable visual foundation for the brand's future communication.

LEFT_POSTER008.name: SAMMI — Street Art Museum Milano
LEFT_POSTER008.description: This project explores the creation of a cultural identity for SAMMI (Street Art Museum Milano), a conceptual initiative designed to celebrate urban art within the city. The project includes the design of the SAMMI logo, the selection of a potential urban location, and the development of an event concept that connects artists, visitors and the city. The visual identity translates the raw language of street culture into a structured branding system, turning the museum into an open platform for contemporary urban expression.
